The '''''Pegasus''''' was a [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] that served in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic's]] [[Pegasus Strike Force]], under the command of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Longmar]], during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

{{Ship-stub}}
